title: Sissit
writer: Jouni Apajalahti, Matti Kassila, Mikko Niskanen
actors: Matti Oravisto, Kauko Laurikainen, Paul Budsko
plot: Lieutenant Takala joins a group of war veterans who gather in a restaurant to reminisce their unit's operations on the Finnish-Soviet front. A flashback takes us back to summer 1944 where the unit, led by Takala, performs dangerou...
